comment: Stage-0 donor pins, enforced by invariant I11 (docs/fusion/FUSION_PLAN.md). Donors are read-only; HEAD must equal the pinned SHA and the working tree must be clean at every Burgess commit. The donor repos are no longer published, so these local sibling checkouts are the surviving copies and the SHAs are permanent — Decision Rule D5 (upstream drift / re-sync) is retired, see docs/fusion/DECISIONS.md. The gate needs only `path` and `sha`.
